title: Even Better Weapons
body:
# Even Better Weapons

✨ Even Better Weapons is a Minecraft resource pack, that changes the standard vanilla Minecraft weapon textures to look better. (See gallery images)

🔧 Put this resource pack into the folder: ```.minecraft/resourcepacks``` and enable it in-game in: ```Options > Resource Packs```.

❗ There are more updated tools than shown in the gallery, but more tools are going to be updated in the future.
